iti55:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti55:2.3: The search for sensuality, the search for becoming, the search for a holy life.
iti55:3.3: i.e., grasping at ‘such is the truth’
iti55:3.4:
based on an accumulation of viewpoints:
through the relinquishing of searches & the abolishing of viewpoints
iti55:4.1: of one dispassionate to all passion,
iti55:4.2: and released in the ending of craving,
iti55:4.5: through the ending of searches, the monk
iti55:4.6: is without perplexity, free of longing.
